system: white void + ONE rendered character (more detailed than the in-video stick style) + big black condensed ALL-CAPS text + exactly one red element (blood, arrow, or a red text block) + explicit-comic violence + a face showing rage/grief/fear, never neutral

templates.recipe: 2-4 word punch phrase (NOT the title) top, thick red arrow from text to the payoff object, subject opposite
title echo across top, subject center-right, mascot reacting (sweat/gasp) left third
character left, title text right, key phrase line in RED caps, rest black

aaaflow_mapping.kicker_style: 2-4 word punch phrase, never the title verbatim
aaaflow_mapping.background: our cream paper instead of their white void (channel differentiation)
aaaflow_mapping.accent: dried-blood red #b33a2b as THE one red element
aaaflow_mapping.face: expressive emotion mandatory (studio emotion rule aligns)
aaaflow_mapping.note: typeset text only (studio rule); red arrow is a compositing asset, not AI-drawn
